themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "Ye shall do my judgments, and keep mine ordinances, to walk therein: I am the LORD your God....". Word-study detail reinforces "חֻקֹּתַי֙: my statutes - a statute".
